OUT OF SCOPE: 'Appendix A: Judgment Under Uncertainty' is the reprinted 1974 Tversky & Kahneman Science article, not part of the book's Conclusions synthesis. Including it (paras 1-81, ~6300 words) would blow well past the chapter band [2758,4481]. The brief scopes ch39 to Kahneman's Conclusions synthesis.

OUT OF SCOPE: entire body of reprinted Appendix A academic article (authorship line, Representativeness/Availability/Anchoring sections, hospital/engineer-lawyer/Steve studies, Summary). Separately-published reprint, not the Conclusions synthesis; excluded to honor the chapter band and the brief's scoping of ch39 to Kahneman's closing synthesis.

source_note: Source EPUB had scattered OCR corruption (~0.2% of tokens). Per user instruction, verbatim anchors preserve source text exactly; a few quoted spans contain garbled tokens. Appendices A/B, Notes, and Index were intentionally out of scope.
